name: Wheel of Stars
description:
While attuned to this device, you have a +1 bonus to Wisdom saving throws, and you can use an action to cast the {@spell dancing lights}, {@spell guidance}, or {@spell message} cantrips.
{"type": "entries", "name": "Portent of the Stars", "entries": ["As a reaction when a creature you can see within 60 feet of you makes an attack roll, saving throw, or ability check, you make that creature roll a {@dice d10} and add or subtract the number rolled (your choice) from the roll.
